title: inula glanduligera
intro: Inula glanduligera is a type of flowering plant, also known as Chinese golden aster or Baishaoye, which belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antiviral and anticancer properties. Inula glanduligera can be prepared into herbal supplements, such as capsules or tablets, as well as teas and infusions, which are commonly used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
